title: Royal Blue Polka Dot Latex Balloons (30cm) Pack of 6 - Premium Quality, Perfect for Parties & Celebrations
features: EYE-CATCHING POLKA DOT DESIGN: Stand out with these vibrant royal blue polka dot latex balloons, perfect for adding a splash of fun and color to any party or celebration.
HIGH-QUALITY & DURABLE: Made from premium latex material, our 30cm balloons are built to last and maintain their shape and vibrant colors throughout your event.
CONVENIENT PACK OF 6: This pack includes 6 royal blue polka dot balloons, allowing you to effortlessly coordinate your decorations and create a stunning display.
VERSATILE & PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION: Ideal for birthdays, baby showers, bridal showers, weddings, anniversaries, and more - these balloons can elevate any event's atmosphere.
EASY TO INFLATE & ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY: Simply inflate with air or helium for a floating, attention-grabbing display. Plus, our latex balloons are biodegradable, so you can party responsibly.
description: Product Description Give an instant lift to your party décor with these stylish Latex Royal Blue Polka Dot Balloons. Featuring a classic royal blue and white polka dot design, these eye-catching party balloons are ideal for decorating a birthday party, fundraiser, graduation party, Hanukkah celebration or other special occasion. Combine these latex balloons with curling ribbon and other foil helium balloons to create a stunning balloon bouquet, or arrange by themselves for a quick party decoration. Manufacturer's Description Give an instant lift to your party décor with these stylish Latex Royal Blue Polka Dot Balloons. Featuring a classic royal blue and white polka dot design, these eye-catching party balloons are ideal for decorating a birthday party, fundraiser, graduation party, Hanukkah celebration or other special occasion. Combine these latex balloons with curling ribbon and other foil helium balloons to create a stunning balloon bouquet, or arrange by themselves for a quick party decoration. Box Contains 6 30cm Blue Polka Dot Latex Balloons See more
